productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's White Crew Length Socks
description: CompositionWhite socks made of 100% cotton, with a yellow and grey border at the ankleMeasurementCrew lengthWash careMachine wash warm in not more than 40 degreesUse non-chlorine bleach if neededDo not use softenersTumble dry lowDo not dry cleanDo not ironGuaranteed to stay soft and cushioned after multiple washes, these socks from wrangler are ideal wear with sneakers or formal shoes. Add style to your attire with these socks and feel free to step in comfort.
